title: Bright Blocks
description: Adds a slight glow to ores, making them visible when mining in the dark.
body:
**Bright Blocks** is a texture that uses Optifine to function properly. When downloading, make sure you have Optifine installed on your game version. Otherwise, the texture will not work. For use with fabric, it is recommended to install a **continuity** mod for it to work properly.

List of all blocks:

• Ancient Debris
• Coal
• Copper
• Diamond
• Emerald
• Gold
• Iron
• Lapis
• Nether Gold
• Redstone
• Nether Quartz

**Obvious note: All OverWorld ores, including deepslate, have a shiny texture**.

This texture was created with the goal of being as LIGHT as possible.
